name: rex
description: Config-driven, multi-tier agent system with composable agent primitives

scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: bun run --cwd packages/external/prompt-protocol build && bun run --cwd packages/core/protocol build && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/semantic-compiler build && bun run --cwd packages/core/types build && bun run --cwd packages/core/shared build && bun run --cwd packages/core/work build && bun run --cwd packages/core/llm build && bun run --cwd packages/core/context build && bun run --cwd packages/core/tools build && bun run --cwd packages/core/agent build && bun run --cwd packages/infra/comms-bus build && bun run --cwd packages/infra/harness-client build && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/agent-memory build && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/memory-injector build && bun run --cwd packages/infra/decision-watcher build && bun run --cwd packages/core/orchestrator build && bun run --cwd packages/infra/graphd build && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/entity-graph build
scripts.build:apps: bun run --cwd packages/infra/harness-daemon build && bun run --cwd packages/infra/control-plane build && bun run --cwd packages/apps/tui build && bun run --cwd packages/apps/launcher build && bun run --cwd packages/apps/dashboard-control build
scripts.clean: bun run --cwd packages/core/types clean && bun run --cwd packages/core/shared clean && bun run --cwd packages/external/prompt-protocol clean && bun run --cwd packages/core/protocol clean && bun run --cwd packages/core/work clean && bun run --cwd packages/core/llm clean && bun run --cwd packages/core/context clean && bun run --cwd packages/core/tools clean && bun run --cwd packages/core/agent clean && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/agent-memory clean && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/memory-injector clean && bun run --cwd packages/core/orchestrator clean && bun run --cwd packages/infra/decision-watcher clean && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/semantic-compiler clean && bun run --cwd packages/infra/graphd clean && bun run --cwd packages/infra/comms-bus clean && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/entity-graph clean && bun run --cwd packages/infra/harness-client clean && bun run --cwd packages/infra/harness-daemon clean && bun run --cwd packages/infra/control-plane clean && bun run --cwd packages/apps/tui clean && bun run --cwd packages/apps/launcher clean && rm -f packages/core/*/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo packages/infra/*/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo packages/plugins/*/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo packages/external/*/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo packages/apps/*/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd packages/core/types lint && bun run --cwd packages/core/shared lint && bun run --cwd packages/core/llm lint && bun run --cwd packages/core/context lint && bun run --cwd packages/core/tools lint && bun run --cwd packages/core/agent lint && bun run --cwd packages/core/orchestrator lint && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/semantic-compiler lint && bun run --cwd packages/infra/graphd lint && bun run --cwd packages/infra/comms-bus lint && bun run --cwd packages/infra/control-plane lint
scripts.typecheck:split-runtime: bun run --cwd packages/core/types lint && bun run --cwd packages/core/shared lint && bun run --cwd packages/core/protocol lint && bun run --cwd packages/infra/comms-bus lint && bun run --cwd packages/infra/harness-client lint && bun run --cwd packages/infra/graphd lint && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/agent-memory lint && bun run --cwd packages/infra/harness-daemon lint && bun run --cwd packages/infra/control-plane lint
